title: Cirrus: Collect audit log on success and failure

comments.body: Needs a rebase to get the SELinux fixes.
@rhatdan good idea, adding 'journalctl -b'.  okay, rebased and --force pushed.
Hrmmm, dang, no 'audit.log' on Ubuntu.  Google tells me `kern.log` is the same, so grabbing that.

@baude @mheon When you have a moment PTAL.  This collects the journal and audit logs on all platforms, making them available through the Cirrus WebUI (and a google storage bucket), for example [the one from the rootless task on this PR](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/4693419380178944) and [the same thing directly from the storage bucket.](https://storage.cloud.google.com/cirrus-ci-5385732420009984-fcae48/logs/containers/libpod/4693419380178944/audit_log?_ga=2.38663587.-1670000616.1540407237)
